Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Diamond Veins]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin mentions needing the Diamond Veins to avoid her channels being shredded by the technique.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Diamond Veins costs 2000 points.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Diamond Veins is a high-value item.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon hopes Northstrider will gift him Diamond Veins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Without the Diamond Veins, Yerin's madra channels would have torn apart during the technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Ruby's copy of Yerin's Diamond Veins progressed.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin absorbed the Diamond Veins won in the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon has absorbed the Diamond Veins.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
